title: Bottom Navigation Look Type
description: Type definition for the visual appearance style of the bottom navigation component. This type defines the different look variants available for styling the bottom navigation bar.

sections.title: Type Definition
sections.description: A union type that defines the visual appearance style of the bottom navigation component. 'solid' provides a solid background, 'with-line' adds a line indicator, 'pills' creates pill-shaped items, and 'pills-color' creates colored pill-shaped items.

props.name: AXBottomNavigationLook
props.description: Union of bottom navigation look styles.
